---
title: "Publications"
bibliography: references.bib
csl: apa_modified.csl
---

Below, you'll find a list of my publications. Feel free to also check out my [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=wRv_T7sAAAAJ&hl=en), [GitHub](https://github.com/LucasDLalande) or [ORCID](https://orcid.org/my-orcid?orcid=0000-0001-9319-8033) profiles.

If you can't access any of the articles, don't hesitate to [write me](lalande.luke@gmail.com) to get a copy!

### Published articles

@perezPossibleExposureUnidentified2026b

@lalandeEarlylifeGlucocorticoidsAccelerate2024

@lalandeGlucocorticoidsNegativelyRelate2023

@lalandeSexspecificBodyMass2022

### Ph.D. thesis

@lalandeStressSanteSenescence2023

### Softwares

@lalandeSelectoolsFacilitatingModel2026

@lalandeConwaysGoLEasytohandleConways2026
